title: Price Action Quantification Analysis Tool
subtitle: Automated Detection and Win-Rate Tracking for Pin Bars, Doji, Engulfing, Marubozu Patterns
author: Christian Benjamin (lynnchris)
verdict: EXTRACT — all four candlestick pattern formulas (exact ratios), win-rate tracking pattern, ATR-normalized minimum body size. Direct upgrade for our departure candle gate.

core_concept.name: Candlestick Pattern Quantification
core_concept.description: Detect 4 candlestick pattern types geometrically using body/shadow ratios. Track win rate by checking if the next bar moves in the expected direction. ATR-based minimum body size ensures only meaningful candles are considered.
core_concept.relevance_to_creviaderiv: Our departure candle gate checks (close > open for BUY, close < open for SELL). This is a minimal check. Upgrading to pin bar or engulfing detection adds pattern strength — a bullish engulfing departure is more reliable than a small green candle.

pin_bar.bearish: top_shadow >= WickBodyRatio * candle_body AND bot_shadow < SmallWickCap * candle_body
pin_bar.bullish: bot_shadow >= WickBodyRatio * candle_body AND top_shadow < SmallWickCap * candle_body
pin_bar.meaning: Rejection candle — strong wick in one direction, small body, minimal shadow on other side

doji.condition: candle_body <= MaxDojiRatio * full_range AND top_shadow > candle_body AND bot_shadow > candle_body
doji.meaning: Indecision candle — body ≤10% of range, shadows on both sides exceed body

engulfing.bullish: prev_bearish AND curr_open <= prev_close AND curr_close >= prev_open AND curr_body > prev_body
engulfing.bearish: prev_bullish AND curr_open >= prev_close AND curr_close <= prev_open AND curr_body > prev_body
engulfing.meaning: Current candle completely engulfs prior body — momentum shift signal

marubozu.condition: candle_body >= MarubozuRatio * full_range AND top_shadow <= (1-MarubozuRatio)*full_range AND bot_shadow <= (1-MarubozuRatio)*full_range
marubozu.meaning: Dominant momentum candle — body ≥90% of range, minimal wicks. Strong directional commitment.

InpMinBodySizePts.description: Minimum candle body in points — filters micro-candles

win_rate_tracking.method: On detection, mark pattern. Check next completed candle direction. If direction matches signal = win.
win_rate_tracking.note: Single-bar forward test only. Not a full trade simulation.

keep: All four pattern formulas (pin bar, doji, engulfing, marubozu) with exact ratio parameters
InpMinBodySizePts as ATR-normalized minimum (replace fixed points with ATR fraction)
WickBodyRatio=2.0 and MarubozuRatio=0.9 as calibrated defaults
discard: InpMinBodySizePts fixed points — replace with min_body = ATR * 0.1
Single-bar forward test for win rate — too short for realistic SL/TP evaluation
improve: ATR-normalize min body: min_body = ATR(14) * 0.1 — scales with instrument
Upgrade departure candle gate: require engulfing or pin bar AT zone, not just any directional candle
Pattern strength score: marubozu=3, engulfing=2, pin_bar=2, directional=1 → add to signal confidence

upgrade.marubozu_departure: body >= ATR*0.5 AND wicks < 10% of range → confidence=HIGH
upgrade.pin_bar_departure: bot_shadow >= 2*body (bullish pin at demand zone) → confidence=MEDIUM

creviaderiv_departure_upgrade.implementation: departure_strength = classify_departure_candle(open, high, low, close, atr) → 'strong'/'medium'/'weak'
